---
id: upload-nzb-and-get-stream-ur-ls
title: "Upload NZB and get stream URLs"
description: "Accepts a .nzb file upload, queues it with high priority, waits for processing to complete, and returns Stremio-compatible stream URLs for all media files. Authenticated via download_key (SHA256 of user API key). Caches results for re-use."
sidebar_label: "Upload NZB and get stream URLs"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/4. API/altmount-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Upload NZB and get stream URLs"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/nzb/streams"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Accepts a .nzb file upload, queues it with high priority, waits for processing to complete, and returns Stremio-compatible stream URLs for all media files. Authenticated via download_key (SHA256 of user API key). Caches results for re-use.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./upload-nzb-and-get-stream-ur-ls.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
